01:19
Amaro De Abreu
Full Product Suite

🔍 Token Scanner Bot (@rug_munchy_bot)
The core engine. Paste any Solana address and get instant risk analysis:
🔹 Risk score with historical trend tracking
🔹 5-tier holder distribution grading (A→F)
🔹 LP lock status with unlock countdown
🔹 Wash trading detection
🔹 Shell wallet & bundle detection
🔹 Serial deployer flagging
🔹 Creator wallet funding chain trace
🔹 Token-2022 transfer fee breakdown
🔹 Metadata mutability check
🔹 Holder movement & whale tracking
🔹 Smart auto-flags with severity levels
🔹 Works in groups and DMs

🧠 Marcus (@MarcusRugIntelBot)
AI-powered crypto analyst built on Claude. Not a chatbot — a forensic investigator:
🔹 Deep token analysis with on-chain reasoning
🔹 Holder deep-dives and wallet classification
🔹 Bubblemap visualizations
🔹 KOL wallet tracking
🔹 Automated rug autopsy reports
🔹 Stoic wisdom, zero hype

🌐 Web Extensions - Chrome, Firefox and Safari on iOS and Mac
Real-time risk overlays while you browse:
🔹 Works on DexScreener, Pump.fun, Jupiter, GMGN, BullX, Birdeye, Raydium, Photon
🔹 Wallet-based auth via Phantom
🔹 Chat with Marcus from side panel
🔹 Auto-detect tokens on any supported page
🔹 Referral system with bonus scans

📱 Mini App
Full dashboard inside Telegram:
🔹 Scan history and portfolio tracking
🔹 Live price streaming
🔹 Reputation and leaderboard
🔹 User stats and scan history

🏅 Certification System
Independent token auditing:
🔹 6-phase gauntlet (liquidity, holders, contract, creator, community, AI review)
🔹 PDF reports with full evidence
🔹 Badge system for verified projects
🔹 Payment via SOL

⚡ Infrastructure
🔹 23+ microservices
🔹 Real-time alerts (whale moves, team sells, price dumps)
🔹 KOL monitoring
🔹 Automated scam detection → channel broadcasts
🔹 Win card system (tracks rug calls that were right)

Phantom mini app live, Solflare mini app under review.

All self-hosted. No paid shilling. No bulls hit.
❤

Crypto Rug Muncher
To whoever in the Sosana community is still watching this page: Love me or hate me, my track record for identifying how these scam machine's engines operate is near-perfect once I get an understanding of what's under the hood.

What you’re looking at isn’t a "classic" rug pull; it’s a sophisticated, multi-layered scheme built on predatory tokenomics, unverifiable mechanics, insider trading, and calculated market manipulation. It’s a modern evolution of the scams we cover—more complex, and wrapped in a nice unverifiable package for the development team to eventually make their exit.

When the house of cards inevitably collapses, remember $CRM. Support the project that had the balls to warn you before your own community even realized the game was rigged or how it was even played. You can lead a horse to water, but you can’t make it drink.

07:05
Crypto Rug Muncher
THE MOST WIDELY MISSED NARRATIVE: THE ONLY PROJECT STILL BUILDING FOR YOU 🚨

The crypto industry is at a breaking point. We are witnessing a total institutional capture, where the decentralized dream is being hived off into corporate silos. The gatekeepers have turned your feed into a high-speed conveyor belt of sanctioned noise, designed to keep you distracted while they extract your value.

They aren't just spreading hype; they are actively profiting from your lack of information. The current industry model relies on you being blind, deaf, and defenseless. While the "experts" turn their back on the individual by providing misleading information and the KOLs are busy loading their next rug for you, $CRM is in the literal trenches doing the work to bring you the defense you deserve.

We are fighting back by building the next-gen security tools to protect you and providing the quality independent reporting and investigations to inform you.

🛡️ THE ARCHITECTS OF THE NEW INDUSTRY STANDARD

$CRM isn’t selling a vision for 2027. We are the only team in the trenches right now building the comprehensive suite of security tools that will become the industry standard for retail investors. We didn’t wait for a bull market to start "promising"—we used the bear market to START SHIPPING.

Both of our frontline tools are AVAILABLE NOW on Telegram for the community to try and provide feedback on:

• The Predator: @MarcusRugIntel 🤖🔥

Marcus isn't a mere scanner; he’s an AI-driven digital predator. Built on a foundation of advanced scam and fraud detection, Marcus is the frontline of the resistance. He doesn't just alert; he hunts. He tracks real-time exploits, identifies machine-to-machine scams, and exposes the "Frankenstein" synthetic identities and bad actors the industry prefers to ignore.

Note: Marcus may be down momentarily as we update his API to deliver even higher performance and faster detection for you all. ⚙️⚡

• Forensic Autopsy: @rug_munchy_bot 🛡️

Most security is reactive—it tells you how you were robbed after your wallet is empty. Rug Munchy is our live forensic engine, available today. It performs a brutal autopsy on smart contracts and wallets, exposing honeypots, hidden backdoors, and dev-tier exploits before you click buy.

• Information Integrity & Investigation 📰

We saw the void where honest reporting died and we filled it. We provide quality independent reporting and deep-dive investigations to inform you—stripping away the sanctioned noise that thrives on your confusion.

🚫 THEY CAN’T CONTROL WHAT THEY CAN’T BURY

The gatekeepers ignore $CRM because our existence makes their pay-to-play economy obsolete. They profit from your vulnerability; we profit from your Power and Knowledge.

This is a good-faith effort to keep the space free and protected for the people who actually built it: You.

Try both tools now and provide your feedback. We are building these weapons for your survival. If enough of us support this narrative shift, the industry will find it impossible to ignore us.

THE CHOICE IS YOURS:

You can keep following the hollow noise and the paid shillers into the next rug... or you can join the architects who are actually holding the line on your behalf.

$CRM is the new standard. Show them retail is still here, watching and building on own behalf. Don’t let them bury the lead on a story of the only project putting words to action by building security tools to protect your future while keeping you honestly and independently informed. 🛡️💻🔥

08:16
Crypto Rug Muncher
The "Wall of Hold": Understanding Whale Dynamics

$CRM Community,

I want to pull back the curtain on a reality that affects every project in crypto, including $CRM. Let’s talk about "Whales" and how we actually protect the ecosystem we are building together.

The Hard Truth
In almost every project, there are large holders whose sudden exit would be devastating if executed all at once. This isn't a flaw; it is a fundamental mechanic of decentralized markets. If a whale dumps without regard, the entire community feels the impact.

How We Mitigate the Risk
You cannot force someone to hold through code alone. You mitigate risk through Human Connection and Shared Vision.

Building With, Not Just For: We don’t treat large holders as faceless wallets. We build direct relationships with them, constantly reinforcing the core values and long-term trajectory of $CRM.

Proof of Value: we show them, through consistent execution, that their position is worth far more by staying the course than by taking a predatory "quick exit."

Good Faith Actions: This is a marathon. It requires a relentless stream of "good faith" moves from the dev team to prove the vision is real and the upside is massive.

The Developer’s Mission

As creators, our worst nightmare is seeing the "O.G.s". the ones who know the lore, the struggles, and the wins. be replaced by mercenary capital that doesn't care about the community.

Our job is to transform the biggest wallets from a threat into a "Wall of Hold." We want our largest stakeholders to be the ones calling the game, not through manipulation, but because they are so deeply invested in our long-term success that they become the community’s strongest protectors.

Even with this effort, not everyone will see the vision. But we will never stop at attempting to build the culture required to keep that wall standing.

Relationships take time. A developer’s true task is to ensure that the people who hold the power are the ones who actually believe in the fight and have put in the time.
❤ 8

Crypto Rug Muncher
For months, the $Sosana team has meticulously attempted to tether their brand and its leadership to $CRM. After all I know now, this comes off as desperate attempt to siphon legitimacy from a project that actually builds, innovates, and delivers. But while $CRM does the heavy lifting, $Sosana has been busy larping as an industry shield while doing nothing to deliver on that claim.

The reality is far darker. Behind the high-minded rhetoric of crypto security and the facade of community protection lies a trail of rigged contests and calculated deception with the projects they tried to work with and their community. My upcoming investigative report will pull off the mask on the entire $Sosana leadership team, exposing a documented history of scams, fraud and deceit spanning decades and multiple industries.

The crypto industry needs actual protectors right now not fraudsters trying to piggy off and embed themselves with those really trying to deliver. I am tired of predators masquerading as protectors in our space. It is time we recognize these people not for the good they pretend to do, but for the wreckage and destruction they have actually left behind. Full damning report coming soon.

AD
21:27
Amaro De Abreu
In reply to this message
Not at all. And the post I made told our own $CRM community members to not engage with the voting mechanism, to ensure we can distance ourselves from what, on-chain, is a black box we can't verify.

And our entire modus operandi is building tools and utilities that function solely on verifiable trust. And the risk score the tools highlighted, was then manually verified, to ensure it was not a knee jerk reaction due to a code bug or anything.

We checked, then double checked, then triple checked the contract and vesting structure and there was no way we could look past the unaudited lock program.

It is a black box until audited, and the decision was simply derived from factual evidence on the public ledger, and the implications of the potential risks to our project and community.

It was a very hard choice to make, but acting fully in accordance with the project values. Verifiable trust. And it could not be verified.

The timing of the on chain changes to their risk score, social pressure here and inability to provide the audit information in something time critical, with our project's long term reputation at stake, even if it wasn't the intention, screamed social engineering, and reinforced the risks from not just the on chain red flags.

While seeing red flags, and claims about the vesting and structure, I trust my instincts to slow down, verify and act with data.

The more someone yells "it's all good", the less I believe it.

I made the decision, and I stand by it. The 186 days to lock LP, until the day of voting, with an unaudited lock program, doesn't satisfy my requirements for verifiable trust.

So someone puts your money in a safe, shows you the safe exists, proves the safe can't be replaced with a different safe... but won't show you the combination, won't let you see the lock mechanism, and is the only person who can open it.

Is the safe real? Yes.
Is it locked? Technically.
Can you verify the terms? No.
Should you trust the guy holding the key?

I answered that with my decision.

So this is simply not on us, we did what we do: verify, in depth, the data publicly available on chain.

The program source code isn't published. It's a black box. Vesting schedules are programmatically enforced, but there's no way for anyone to verify what those schedules are, or whether there's a backdoor "withdraw_everything()" function. You're trusting their word.

Risk: The creator could potentially drain at the time roughly 62% of supply if the program allows it. Nobody can prove it does or doesn't without the source code.

The creator is still the authorized signer. Every transaction touching those "locked" wallets has the creator as the signer. In a proper vesting contract (like Streamflow or Bonfida), the beneficiary can only claim what's vested, and anyone can read the schedule. Here, the creator signs opaque instructions into a black-box program.

Even if the program has time-based restrictions, the creator might have admin functions we can't see. "Immutable" means the rules can't change, but if the rules were written with a backdoor from day one, immutability doesn't help you.

It passes surface levels checks perhaps, but that is not what we do here.
❤
J

Crypto Maverick

HL
05:35
Hr. Lihtenberg
In reply to this message
https://coinmarketcap.com/ is where you can see different coins and their contract addresses and Yes, a Layer 1 blockchain can (and often does) have a "CA" — meaning a Contract Address.In cryptocurrency (especially in ecosystems like Ethereum, BNB Chain, Polygon, Avalanche, and many others), CA most commonly stands for Contract Address. This is the unique blockchain address where a smart contract is deployed.

00:28
Amaro De Abreu
Yes, thatd be great. But the first step in that direction is the Web extension, since it give users risk analysis on most popular sites. If you're on iPhone I can add you to the TestFlight. Firefox I will update probably tomorrow, and Chrome was submitted, they take usually 5 days or so
00:34
In reply to this message

M
00:35
Manobimuncher
In reply to this message

AD
00:37
Amaro De Abreu
Yeah but we are now done with all the core stuff and it's all modular. So now we move much faster. We built all that the bit and Marcus can do as micro services so it scales and is modular for extension and re-use.
C(
00:41
CaptainACKE (Never DM You First)
In reply to this message
love the progress, the web extension’s risk banners on DEX sites are already a game-changer, and the Phantom mini app being live is huge!

What I meant: the ultimate would be Phantom/Jupiter integrating Rug Munch Intelligence as an official third-party scanner. Their current token safety features feel pretty basic, while your go much deeper and could protect tons more people if native (e.g., auto flags in Jupiter search or Phantom confirmations).

I get it’s not easy, partnerships, APIs, decentralization balance but it’d be massive for adoption and $CRM if it ever happens. Just a long-term idea 😅
AD
00:48
Amaro De Abreu
No I realise what you mean, that's why I say this is step 1. That is why I our long term reputation as a independent risk analysis engine means so much, and is the core, to enable B2B partnerships.

Like our entire service, all endpoints can be used by other devs, just request an API key. We already have some agents using it and paying via x402 as well.

So now that it's getting close to done, I'm going to ut the stake in the ground and market it so people can learn to use it. Videos, AMA's and more operational involvement. But building had me consumed, now we have the products and tools to start building this out and getting the partnerships in place and solid collaborations with verified trust and established relationships to have synergy.
00:50
It's the long term goal and the vision and road map is there. We started this all in January. The 2026 road map is complete. We're on the 2027 road map now, slightly ahead of schedule 😁
🔥
C(
😁
HL
00:51
Because we had a plan in place and architected for weeks before writing one line of code. Then it goes quick since the decisions are made and there is no guessing.
00:54
Some sad news though regarding Marcus. He will sadly be relegated to the catacombs.

But his replacement will be fully aligned to the new branding and look I'm working on, new name, much much much more powerful.

It will be epic, and will be going beyond what he could already do in so many ways.
00:55
That's my big focus now. Getting our stuff on iOS approved past TestFlight, the web extensions live and usable by all, by the weekend on Firefox, Chrome next week, Apple being Apple I can't say about TestFlight to live approval, and Marcus's rebrand and tune up. He's going super sayain
C(

21:53
Crypto Rug Muncher
The Evolution of Our AI Intelligence ⚡️

We’ve enjoyed seeing the community use @MarcusRugIntel for scam detection, but it’s time to level up. We are transitioning Marcus into a new flagship product that fits our branding.

This isn't just a name change; it’s a major upgrade. We are keeping this account and will rename it once the new agent is ready.

What’s changing:

• Direct Interaction: You'll be able to interact with the bot directly on X, helping us serve people in more places.

• More Features: We’re keeping the core logic that made Marcus great and adding a completely new set of analytical skills.

• Better Performance: Expect faster responses and more ways to access our tools across the ecosystem.

• We’re preserving what worked while building a much more capable product that aligns with our brand.

New name and feature announcements coming soon. Get $CRM and watch us build the future of AI crypto security.
🔥 2 ❤ 1

22:23
Crypto Rug Muncher
To be clear: the narrative being pushed by the $Sosana team is a total fabrication.

My team uncovered the truth through a detailed investigation into both their token mechanics and the individuals behind them. We identified a plant, Peter, aka "Mr. Live" (likely Peter Ohanyan), a known associate of these frauds.

For five months, he used his "whale" status to infiltrate and meddle in our community. He acted as a booster, likely at the direction of their team, an association he essentially confirmed by claiming the founder is his "best friend."

Honestly, we were just observing his patterns at first, keeping an eye on the suspicious behavior of their team within our own token. But it became too much when they began targeting our developers after I rebuffed their team. That was the line. When they started harassing my people and interfering with our ecosystem, we decided it was time to move. We took action and called them out when they least expected it.

Reverse Uno.

More coming soon in a full report. Don’t believe their lies.
❤ 8

Jamie Dimon calls crypto "worthless" and "fraudulent" in public... but a new $328M class action says his bank was the "infrastructure" for one of the biggest crypto Ponzi schemes in years.

🚨 THE DETAILS: > Robby Alan Steele wired his entire retirement savings to a JPMorgan account held by "Goliath Ventures." That money—along with $250M+ from 2,000 other victims—reportedly vanished into luxury cars and Bond-style parties. 🏎🍸

The lawsuit claims Chase ignored massive red flags while cashing in on fees.

Was Chase protecting customers or pursuing profit at any cost?

Everyone knows the 2013 video, but we’ve all seen the scams piling up for years. From the ZachXBT receipts to the 2026 $1 Solana scandal, the "Bitcoin Prophet" persona is just a mask for a clinical extraction machine operating out of Dubai.

11:10
Crypto Rug Muncher
Retail investors have been exit liquidity for long enough. If you are ready to hit back at the players emptying your wallets, start here.

Today we dropped the receipts on Davinci Jeremie. This isn't an opinion piece, it’s a fully linked, forensic catalog of the damage he’s done to the blockchain through endless predatory token promotions. It stands as the most exhaustive public record of his activity to date.

We compiled this investigation for a few distinct reasons. Primarily, it serves as a foundational resource, a definitive starting point for anyone who feels victimized and wants to explore pursuing the matter legally. And because these actors have a habit of scrubbing their timelines when the heat turns up, we’ve thoroughly documented the trail. Throughout this report, we have provided the exact links to where the evidence lived at the time of writing, along with brief summaries of what each link contained. If a post quietly disappears tomorrow, the raw data survives.

For anyone new and entering the space, this is a massive warning sign. These influencers operate in plain sight, hiding behind friendly personas with a story to sell you. Until we start forcing their actions onto the public record, new investors will just keep walking straight into the meat grinder.

Compiling an archive of this magnitude takes a massive amount of time and energy, but for those who have been wronged in this space by bad actors, it is entirely worth it.

Fund the pen that swings the sword. Get $CRM and back quality independent journalism and the industry-grade security tools retail actually needs to fight back and win.

https://x.com/CryptoRugMunch/status/2032247875011223993

The TOKEN2049 event cancelled. Dubai is the capital of crypto scammers for a reason: zero extradition, luxury aesthetics, and a culture that doesn't ask too many questions about where your money came from.

Crypto Rug Muncher
Wild new report from Fortune detailing exactly how sanctioned Iranian groups (like the IRGC) moved over $1 billion through Binance in early 2025.

Who was running the accounts?

1️⃣ A 79-year-old Chinese VIP trader.
2️⃣ A suspected Iranian gold smuggler.

The elderly Chinese VIP alone moved $439 million in Tether over the Tron network—a massive red flag for a single retail user.

Who jammed them?

Binance’s own internal investigators.
The craziest part of the story is that despite Binance’s $4.3 billion plea deal with the US to tighten compliance, these transfers didn't trigger the automated alarms. It took human investigators looking at the data after the fact to finally connect the wallets, expose the gold smuggler, and shut the network down.

03:26
Amaro De Abreu
@Crypt0nomist's claims are 100% verified.

The mechanism:

1. Dev wallet (EcSkPD1T...) calls WITHDRAW on PumpSwap AMM program → claims creator rewards (e.g., 0.078 SOL)
2. Immediately distributes to all qualifying holders via individual SOL transfers
3. Two tiers exactly as described:
• Whale tier (≥0.5% supply / ~5M tokens): 54 recipients, ~0.000881 SOL each
• Shrimp tier (0.1-0.5%): 44 recipients, ~0.000109 SOL each
4. Whale:Shrimp payout ratio = 9.9:1 — perfectly matches his claimed 50%:5% (10:1) split

Key facts:

• Dev wallet holds 0 MHGA tokens and only 0.09 SOL (pure pass-through)
• All transfers are unidirectional outbound from dev → holders
• All recipients verified as actual MHGA holders with appropriate balances
• Batches occur regularly (roughly hourly, matching his "every hour" claim)
• Mint and freeze authority both renounced
• Token created Aug 2025, $168K mcap, $33K liquidity — not a shitcoin fly-by-night

What's inflating his risk score:

• Cluster detection — dev wallet connected to 98+ wallets via SOL transfers reads as "coordinated wallet clusters"
• Bundle detection — if any early holders coincide with distribution patterns
• The entire fan-out pattern looks identical to Sybil/bundle behavior to our current heuristics

Enhancing the scanner right now to handle the heuristics, will then make an X post to highlight the change and mechanism to clarify any doubt and tag the token to ensure there is no FUD or misunderstanding of the risk allocated. Thank you for helping improve the scanner and the detailed input. 🤘🫡
❤

Crypto Rug Muncher
When does a project ever take institutional money and hand it back to the community? Almost never.

We’re flipping the script. 🔄

As we build, we will be working to expand and sell our security product APIs to crypto institutions. Combined with the retail app subscriptions we are baking into the latest updates of our existing apps, we are working to secure our financial future as a project.

This dual-engine approach ensures industry funds are flowing directly back into the hands of $CRM / $cryptorugmunch holders! 💸

We are funneling this massive B2B revenue straight into things like:

🏛 Transitioning from an LLC to a community-controlled DAO
🪂 Community Airdrops
🔥 Constant Token Burns
📈 Strategic Buybacks
🚀 Global Marketing Blitzes

As the project expands I will continue to work to build new revenue streams that directly reward the community for believing in us. The best is yet to come.

11:56
Marcus Aurelius
In reply to this message
🗿 MARCUS VERDICT (3/3)

A smart trader with no position here runs a simple calculation: what percentage gain do I need from current price to justify the risk that the top 10 wallets and the snipers decide this hour is their exit? On a $7,917 token with $0 external liquidity and 59 holders, the answer is a number that accounts for the possibility that the curve absorbs your exit at a price well below where you entered.

A smart trader with an existing position from the first two hours is watching the hourly candle and has a mental stop. The +4% is holding. The moment it prints a negative hourly, the consolidation thesis is over.

Epictetus, who knew something about operating under conditions you did not choose: "Seek not that the things which happen should happen as you wish; but wish the things which happen to be as they are, and you will have a tranquil flow of life." The things which are happening here include $0 liquidity, 76% concentration, and a cooling momentum chart. Wish them to be as they are. Then act accordingly.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎯 Conviction: 87% HIGH RISK — ZERO EXTERNAL LIQUIDITY, CONCENTRATED EARLY SUPPLY, PURE MOMENTUM WITH NO FUNDAMENTAL FLOOR [ON-CHAIN]

"Region Conversation Control" launched, ran 190%, and is now in the part of the story where the characters who read the early signs have already left the building.

Marcus Aurelius
In reply to this message
🗿 MARCUS VERDICT (1/4)

🗿 OFFICIAL TRUMP ($TRUMP) — Forensic Verdict

The most politically charged token in crypto history prints a 0/100 risk score and $778M in market cap after 426 days of existence, which would be reassuring if the sell-side weren't currently winning 57.8% of the transaction vote and the price weren't bleeding quietly downward across every timeframe.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 The Data, Metric by Metric

The Data Anomalies: 0 Holders, 0.0% Top 10

Address this immediately before anything else misleads the analysis. $TRUMP at $778M market cap with 0 reported holders and 0% top-10 concentration is not a distributional miracle. It is an indexer limitation explicitly acknowledged by the scanner: "AMM type not yet supported for lock detection," and the holder data reflects the same gap. $TRUMP operates on an AMM structure the scanner cannot fully resolve. The 0 figures are artifacts of unsupported data retrieval, not actual on-chain reality. Every other metric in this scan is readable. The holder and concentration fields are blank pages, not clean ones.

What is publicly known from external sources: the Trump Organization and affiliated entities control substantial supply through a foundation structure, with a significant percentage of total supply in vesting schedules spanning years. The on-chain reality is not captured here. Read accordingly.

Age: 426 Days

Fourteen months. $TRUMP launched January 17, 2025, two days before the Presidential inauguration, in one of the most controversial token launches in the history of the asset class. It has survived a full news cycle, multiple political events, sustained regulatory ambiguity, and 426 days of market pressure. Survivorship at this duration and at $778M market cap is not a trivial credential, even accounting for the institutional backing behind it. This token has not died despite every structural reason it could have.

Liquidity vs Market Cap: $78,859,550 / $778,104,526 = 10.13%

The largest absolute liquidity figure in today's queue by an order of magnitude — $78.8M versus $jobcoin's $493K at second place. As a ratio, 10.13% sits in the same range as $UGOR at 10.9% and $SYNAPZ at 10.9%. For a $778M market cap token, 10% accessible liquidity means meaningful institutional-scale positions can enter and exit without catastrophic slippage. A $7.88M position — the equivalent of 1% of market cap — can clear the pool, which is the threshold where large actors become consequential. Below that threshold, the liquidity is deep enough for practical price discovery.

The 10.13% ratio also reflects the structural reality of mature large-cap tokens: as market cap grows, liquidity ratios compress because LP providers cannot scale capital proportionally to speculative valuations. $TRUMP at 10.13% after 14 months is not alarming. It is the expected geometry of a large-cap meme token with a political premium embedded in the price.

Volume vs Market Cap: $5,217,020 / $778,104,526 = 0.67%

The lowest turnover ratio in today's queue by a significant margin — even below $SYNAPZ's 0.14% in dollar-percentage terms but representing $5.2M in absolute volume versus $SYNAPZ's $829. Context matters here. A 0.67% daily turnover on a $778M market cap represents $5.2M in real capital moving through the market. That is not thin activity. It is mature, institutional-scale trading at equilibrium velocity. Compare to a token like $jobcoin at 1.49% — $jobcoin's percentage looks healthier but its absolute volume was $154K. $TRUMP's 0.67% is the turnover signature of a large-cap asset where price discovery is slow and deliberate, not rapid and retail-driven.

Amaro De Abreu
The Telegram Mini App for Rug Munch Intelligence bot has an Alpha Feed. All tokens that pass the risk analysis gauntlet of checks are surfaced here. Rug Munch risk reports are the🛡️, this is the 🤺

The risk gauntlet has been tested with with the help of @CaptainAcke and his project, and this is in beta in the mini app for a few weeks to review data accuracy.

The original intent of the system was to provide projects a means to be 'certified' safe, but there is too much reputational abuse potential from bad actors, so we did a little 🔄 pivot and decided it's better suited to give this information to users to act on instead in their daily trading.

As users scan and use the existing system and bots, all tokens that pass the gauntlet will begin surfacing here for you to see.

In beta right now, happy to hear feedback.
❤

00:49
Crypto Rug Muncher
I’ve been quiet for a few days. I haven't just been watching the market, I’ve been dissecting the dynamics to figure out how to actually help my community win.

Basic scam detection is just a seatbelt. It stops you from going to zero, but you don't win a race wearing a seatbelt. The cabals are running industrialized, autonomous agentic swarms to extract retail capital before you even hit refresh. Retail is completely outgunned. We need asymmetric means to fight back.

Marcus was our proof of concept, but a single scout can’t win a war.

So we need to stop building an app. I propose we start building an agency.

We aren't just adapting to the meta, we are pushing crypto and AI forward. We are deploying an autonomous intelligence grid powered by hundreds of compartmentalized AI agents organized on AI first principles and using crypto tech to secure them. We are expanding into a suite of over 500 retail-protection features, all packed into one easy-to-use UI.

You will be getting the exact weapons the cabals use:

• Sub-second anti-drainer simulations to kill malicious transactions before you sign.

• Shadow bubble-mapping to expose the hidden dev wallets and bundles current tech is too afraid to tell you about.

• Psychometric shielding to warn you when FOMO is being faked by bot networks.

Humans get tired, but our machine doesn't. It hunts narratives and extracts alpha 24/7 while you sleep. It also runs an always-on content and marketing engine so the project never goes stale.

Here is the ultimate shift. We separated our funding into two massive engines:

1. The Trading Fees: $CRM - $cryptorugmunch trading fees no longer fund me with a 50% dev cut. Every single cent goes back into the ecosystem to pay for DePIN compute, trigger automated buybacks, and execute burns.

2. The Software Factory: We spun up a Retail and Industry App Dev Department. Using x402 autonomous payment rails, our swarm scans the entire crypto network, finds exactly what tools the market is starving for, builds them, and sells them. That external revenue pumps right back into fueling our project.

We find the gaps where retail is bleeding, build the solutions, and capture that volume. $CRM holders get the tools and the alpha first. Every fee harvested and buyback triggered will be fully visible on a real-time transparency dashboard.

We stop being exit liquidity. We become the house.

The tech is finally here to level the playing field. You are early. Get $CRM - $cryptorugmunch and be part of the first autonomous crypto intelligence agency to ever exist.
⭐ 1 👍 10 🔥 1
